files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.AppLoggerCompatExtensions
files.Summary: Provides compatibility extension members for to simplify logging calls. This mimics the API of older logging frameworks (like log4net or NLog) while wrapping the standard Microsoft Logging abstractions.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Base64IconResources
files.Summary: Provides embedded base64 icon resources.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.BusyWindow.IAppBusyWindow
files.Summary: Provides a service to display a "Busy" or "Loading" window to the user, typically used to block UI interaction during long-running background tasks.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.BusyWindow.IBusyWindowHandler
files.Summary: Represents a controller for an active busy window. Inherits to allow the 'using' pattern for automatic closing.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.CancelEventArgsEx
files.Summary: Provides cancel event data with a handled indicator.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.ComponentTools
files.Summary: Provides helper methods for component initialization.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.AppConfig
files.Summary: Represents the global configuration for the application.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.CustomWorkspaceLayoutConfig
files.Summary: Stores all persisted user-defined workspace layout presets.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.HamburgerMenuConfig
files.Summary: Configuration settings for the hamburger menu component. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.MainMenuConfig
files.Summary: Configuration settings for the main menu component. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.ModuleConfig
files.Summary: Configuration for managing application modules and external assemblies. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.NavigationConfig
files.Summary: Configuration for the navigation history and behavior. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.StatusBarConfig
files.Summary: Configuration for the application status bar display settings. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.ToastConfig
files.Summary: Configuration for the toast notification system. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.ToastPlacement
files.Summary: Specifies the corner where toast notifications are displayed.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.WindowTitleConfig
files.Summary: Configuration for the application window title visibility. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Config.WorkspaceMenuConfig
files.Summary: Configuration for the workspace-specific menu settings. Implements the interface.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.CornerPreference
files.Summary: Represents window corner rounding preferences.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.DropAction
files.Summary: Defines a specific task or operation that can be performed on the dropped payload.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.DropContext
files.Summary: Captures the environmental state and location when a drop event occurs.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.DropPayload
files.Summary: Represents the data package carried during a drag-and-drop operation.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.DropResolution
files.Summary: Represents the result of resolving a drop operation.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.DropResolutionMode
files.Summary: Specifies how the system should handle and resolve a drop event.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.IDropActionProvider
files.Summary: Provides a way to discover available actions for a specific drop payload and context.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.IDropHandler
files.Summary: Defines a component capable of handling a drop operation.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.IDropOrchestrator
files.Summary: The central coordinator responsible for determining the final resolution of a drop.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.IDropPayloadParser<TDataObject>
files.Summary: Parses raw data objects (e.g., from the OS or UI framework) into a unified .

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.DragDrop.ModifierKeys
files.Summary: Represents the state of modifier keys during the operation.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.FocusedTabItemChangedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when the currently focused tab item in a workspace has changed.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.FullScreennCommandExecutedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when a command to toggle or enter full-screen mode has been executed.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.MainWindowLoadedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when the main application window has been fully loaded and initialized.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.MutexOverrideIdChangedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when mutex override id changed

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.NavigateCompletedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when a navigation request within a workspace has successfully completed.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.QuickMenuItemsChangedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when the collection of items in the quick access menu has been modified.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.SetPreventExitCommandExecutedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when a command to prevent or allow application exit has been executed. Typically used to toggle the "Close to Tray" or "Confirm Before Exit" behavior.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.SetTopmostCommandExecutedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when a command to toggle the "Always on Top" status of the application window has been executed.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.TabItemClosedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when a specific tab item has been closed within a workspace.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.TabItemReloadedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when a tab item instance has been replaced by a freshly loaded instance.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.TabItemsMovedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when one or more tab items are moved from one workspace to another.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.TabItemsRestoreCompletedEvent
files.Summary: Represents a pub-sub event that is published when the restoration process for all tab items has successfully finished.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.TabManagerRestoreCompleted
files.Summary: Event raised when the tab manager has finished restoring all saved tab states and sessions. Typically occurs during application startup or after a profile switch.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.WorkspaceFocusChangedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when the focus shifts between different workspaces.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Event.WorkspaceHighlightEvent
files.Summary: Event raised to toggle the visual highlight state of a specific workspace node, often used during drag-and-drop or search result indexing.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IAppContext
files.Summary: Provides application-level context services.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IAppLogger<T>
files.Summary: Represents a typed application logger.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IAppLogger
files.Summary: Represents application logging operations.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IDialog
files.Summary: Marks a type as an application dialog.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IDialogManager
files.Summary: Manages application dialogs.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IErrorView
files.Summary: Represents a view used to display errors.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IEventAggregator
files.Summary: Provides event publishing and subscription capabilities.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IInnerErrorView
files.Summary: Represents an inner error view region.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.ILifetimeScopeHolder
files.Summary: Provides access to a dependency injection lifetime scope.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IMainWindow
files.Summary: Represents a main window abstraction for the application.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IMenuManager<TItem>
files.Summary: Provides registration and retrieval of menu items.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IModuleLoadInfoManager
files.Summary: Manages the loading status and error information for system modules.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IPairCommand
files.Summary: Represents a command that participates in paired command behaviors.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IPendingDeleteManager
files.Summary: Tracks files pending deletion.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IProduct
files.Summary: Defines the minimum metadata contract for a product or product update.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IRootAdornerLayer
files.Summary: Represents a provider for the root AdornerLayer instance.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IRootGrid
files.Summary: Represents a provider for the root grid instance.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IViewSetter<T>
files.Summary: Defines a helper that owns a view instance and controls its lifecycle.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.IViewSetterEx
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for .

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MCP.ExposeToMCPAttribute
files.Summary: Specifies that an interface or method should be exposed to the Model Context Protocol (MCP). This attribute allows for hierarchical configuration where method-level settings can override interface-level defaults.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MCP.MCPIgnoreAttribute
files.Summary: Specifies that a method should be ignored by the MCP (Model Context Protocol) or related processing.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.AboutMainMenuAnchors
files.Summary: Defines unique anchor identifiers for the "About" main menu category.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.FileMainMenuAnchors
files.Summary: Defines unique anchor identifiers for the "File" main menu category. These strings combine a priority prefix with the member name for consistent sorting and identification.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IAboutMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: A specialized provider responsible for managing and retrieving menu items within the "About" or "Help" main menu category.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IExtensionsMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: A specialized provider responsible for managing and retrieving menu items within the "Extensions" main menu category.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IFileMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: A specialized provider responsible for managing and retrieving menu items within the "File" main menu category.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IFileOpenMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: Defines a provider that supplies main menu items specifically for the "File Open" functionality. Inherits from to integrate with the main menu system.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IHamburgerMenuManager
files.Summary: Provides management capabilities for the hamburger menu, extending the standard main menu functionality.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IMainMenuItem
files.Summary: Defines a single item within the application's main navigation or menu system. Supports hierarchical structures, icons, and display prioritization.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: Represents a menu item that also acts as a container for sub-menu items. This enables a recursive, hierarchical menu structure.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IMainMenuManager
files.Summary: Defines the core manager responsible for the lifecycle and registration of top-level menu items.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IToolsMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: A specialized provider for retrieving menu items specifically belonging to the "Tools" category.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.IViewMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: A specialized provider for retrieving menu items specifically belonging to the "View" category.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.MainMenuItem
files.Summary: A concrete implementation of . Provides properties for menu metadata, sub-items, and command execution.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.MainMenuPriority
files.Summary: Provides a set of predefined priority constants for standard top-level menu categories to ensure consistent ordering.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.MainMenu.MenuItemInfo
files.Summary: Represents the configuration and metadata for a single menu item in the navigation system.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.ModuleLoadErrorInfo
files.Summary: Represents detailed information about an error that occurred during the module loading process.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.ModuleNameTools
files.Summary: Provides helper methods for resolving module names and DLL names.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Notification.Banner.IBanner
files.Summary: Defines a specialized notification type for displaying banner-style messages, typically shown at the top or bottom of the application window.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Notification.Banner.IBannerManager
files.Summary: Defines the contract for managing and displaying banners across the application. Provides high-level methods to trigger specific system notifications.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Notification.INotification
files.Summary: Defines the base contract for all notification types in the system. Provides control over the notification's visibility and lifecycle.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Notification.Toast.IToast
files.Summary: Defines a specialized notification type for displaying toast messages. Implements to support lifecycle events.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Notification.Toast.IToastManager
files.Summary: Defines the contract for managing and displaying toast notifications.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Notification.Toast.ToastMessage
files.Summary: Represents a message model used for displaying toast notifications in the UI.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Overlay.IOverlay
files.Summary: Represents a visual overlay element that can be displayed on the UI. Implements to ensure proper cleanup of visual resources.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Overlay.IOverlayManager
files.Summary: Manages the lifecycle and display of overlays within the application.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.ProductInfo
files.Summary: Provides product-level metadata constants.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.ProductInfoExtended
files.Summary: Contains extended metadata and configuration constants for the ZYC.Framework product. This class serves as a central repository for executable names, project links, and build targets.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.IQuickBarItem
files.Summary: Represents an individual functional item within the QuickBar. Each item binds a visual icon to an executable command.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.IQuickBarItemsProvider
files.Summary: Manages the collection of items displayed in the QuickBar. Handles dynamic registration and removal of items.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.IQuickBarManager
files.Summary: Orchestrates the registration and lifecycle of multiple instances to aggregate items into the main QuickBar UI.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.ISimpleQuickBarItemsProvider
files.Summary: A simplified marker or specialized provider for the QuickBar, used to distinguish basic implementations from more complex or plugin-based providers.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.IStarQuickBarItemsProvider
files.Summary: A specialized provider that manages "Starred" or "Favorite" items within the QuickBar. It links unique URI identifiers to QuickBar items for persistence and tracking.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.QuickBarItemBase
files.Summary: Provides a base implementation for QuickBar items, reducing boilerplate code for custom item types.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.QuickBarItemSeparator
files.Summary: Represents a visual separator within the QuickBar to group related items. Typically rendered as a line or space, with no functional command.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.SimpleQuickBarItem
files.Summary: A standard implementation of a QuickBar item used for general functional buttons.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.QuickBar.StarQuickBarItem
files.Summary: Represents a "Starred" or "Favorite" item in the QuickBar. This class can be used to distinguish bookmarked resources from standard functional items.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.State.NavigationState.HistoryItem
files.Summary: Represents a single entry in the navigation history.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.State.NavigationState
files.Summary: Represents the persisted or current state of navigation within a specific workspace.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.StatusBar.IDefaultStatusBarItemsProvider
files.Summary: A specialized provider responsible for managing the default or core status bar items that appear when the application initializes.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.StatusBar.IStatusBarItem
files.Summary: Represents an individual visual element or status indicator to be displayed in the status bar.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.StatusBar.IStatusBarItemsProvider
files.Summary: Manages the registration and retrieval of status bar items, allowing for modular contribution to the application's bottom bar.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.StatusBar.IStatusBarManager
files.Summary: The central coordinator that manages all status bar contributions. It aggregates items from various providers and categorizes them by their target sections.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.StatusBar.IStatusBarView
files.Summary: Defines the visual contract for the status bar view component. Provides methods to access runtime layout properties.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.StatusBar.StatusBarSection
files.Summary: Specifies the horizontal alignment zones within the status bar.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.ConstantsSourceAttribute
files.Summary: Specifies that a class is a source of constants. This attribute is primarily used for metadata identification or reflection-based discovery.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.INotFoundTabItem
files.Summary: Represents a fallback or "Not Found" state for a tab item instance. Used when a requested tab cannot be located or resolved.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.ISimpleTabItemFactoryManager
files.Summary: Defines a manager responsible for registering and maintaining tab item factories.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.ITabItemFactory
files.Summary: Defines a factory responsible for identifying and creating instances of tab items based on URIs.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.ITabItemFactoryManager
files.Summary: Manages the registration and lifecycle of tab item factories. Acts as a central registry that the system queries to find the appropriate factory for a given URI.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.ITabItemInstance
files.Summary: Represents an active instance of a tab, managing its UI, metadata, and lifecycle.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.ITabItemInstanceEx
files.Summary: Provides extension members for to access underlying reference data directly.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.ITabManager
files.Summary: Defines the core functionality for managing tab item instances across multiple workspaces, handling navigation, lifecycle, and focus state.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.MutableTabReference
files.Summary: A specialized version of that allows the to be modified after initialization.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.PathMatchMode
files.Summary: Specifies how the URI path should be compared.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.SimpleMainMenuItemInfo
files.Summary: Represents the configuration information for a main menu item. Contains display properties like title, icon, and localization settings.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.SimpleTabItemFactoryInfo
files.Summary: Metadata used by the factory to create and register tab items and their associated menu entries.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.SimpleTabItemInfo
files.Summary: Contains detailed information for a tab item, including navigation URI and view mapping.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.TabInsertPosition
files.Summary: Specifies the relative insertion point for a tab item instance.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.TabItemCreationContext
files.Summary: Provides the necessary parameters and scope information required to create and initialize a new tab item instance.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.TabItemFactoryBase
files.Summary: Provides a base implementation for tab item factories. Handles route discovery via attributes and basic URI matching logic.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.TabItemRouteAttribute
files.Summary: Defines a routing rule for a tab item factory based on URI components. Multiple attributes can be applied to support multiple routes.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.TabReference
files.Summary: Represents a unique reference to a tab, identified by a persistent ID and an associated URI.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Tab.TabReferenceEx
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for managing collections of objects.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.TaskbarMenu.ITaskbarMenuItem
files.Summary: Defines the contract for a menu item displayed in the taskbar or system tray. Supports a hierarchical structure for nested sub-menus.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.TaskbarMenu.ITaskbarMenuManager
files.Summary: Defines a manager responsible for handling the lifecycle and registration of menu items within the application's taskbar or system tray context.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.UriQueryNameAttribute
files.Summary: Specifies the custom name for a URI query parameter associated with a property or parameter.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.UriTools
files.Summary: Provides helpers for creating and comparing application URIs.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.WindowState
files.Summary: Represents possible window states.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.WindowTitle.IWindowTitleExtendItem
files.Summary: Defines a contract for items that extend or provide custom content within a window's title bar.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.WindowTitle.IWindowTitleExtendManager
files.Summary: Defines a manager responsible for handling a collection of items that extend the window's title bar.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.WindowTitle.IWindowTitleItem
files.Summary: Defines an interactive item to be displayed within the window title bar. These items are typically rendered as small buttons or icons next to the window controls.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.WindowTitle.IWindowTitleManager
files.Summary: Manages a collection of instances. Inherits from to provide standard menu-like management (e.g., adding, removing, or enumerating items).

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.CustomWorkspaceLayout
files.Summary: Represents a user-defined workspace layout preset, including its metadata, preview thumbnail, and the workspace tree used to restore it.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.IMoveWorkspaceTabItemHeaderContextMenuItemManager
files.Summary: Defines a manager responsible for generating sub-items for the "Move Tab" context menu. This is typically used to provide a list of target workspace nodes where a tab can be relocated.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.IParallelWorkspaceManager
files.Summary: Defines the contract for managing parallel workspaces, handling layout operations such as splitting, merging, and workspace state management.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.IWorkspaceContextMenuManager
files.Summary: Defines a specialized manager for workspace-related context menu items. Inherits from to provide standard lifecycle and collection management for objects.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.IWorkspaceMenuItem
files.Summary: Defines the contract for a menu item within the workspace UI, such as context menus or navigation bars.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.IWorkspaceMenuManager
files.Summary: Defines a specialized manager for workspace-related menu items. Inherits from to provide standard lifecycle and collection management for objects.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.MoveToNewWorkspaceTabItemHeaderContextMenuSubItem
files.Summary: Represents a specific context menu item used to move a tab into a newly created workspace. Unlike its base class, this item does not target an existing node but rather triggers the creation of a new one.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.MoveWorkspaceTabItemHeaderContextMenuSubItem
files.Summary: Represents a specific sub-item in the context menu used for moving workspace tabs. It links a target with the command required to perform the move.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.WorkspaceNode
files.Summary: Represents a node within a hierarchical workspace layout tree. Can be either a parent node (defining a split) or a leaf node (containing navigation state).

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Abstractions.Workspace.WorkspaceNodeEx
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for the class to facilitate tree traversal, searching, indexing, and debugging of the workspace layout.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.AccountLoginRequest
files.Summary: Describes a provider login request.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.AccountProfile
files.Summary: Contains non-secret profile data for a signed-in account.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.AccountProviderDescriptor
files.Summary: Describes an account provider that can authenticate a user.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.AccountSession
files.Summary: Represents a non-secret account session snapshot.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.AccountTokenRequest
files.Summary: Describes an access token acquisition request.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.AccountsState
files.Summary: Stores non-secret account session metadata.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.Event.AccountSessionChangedEvent
files.Summary: Published when the active account session changes.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.Event.AccountSignedInEvent
files.Summary: Published after an account signs in.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.Event.AccountSignedOutEvent
files.Summary: Published after an account signs out.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.IAccountManager
files.Summary: Coordinates account providers and account session state.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.IAccountProvider
files.Summary: Authenticates users through a specific identity provider.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.Abstractions.IAccountTokenStore
files.Summary: Stores provider token payloads outside normal config and state files.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Accounts.GitHub.Abstractions.GitHubAccountConfig
files.Summary: Configures built-in account providers.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.ApiReference.Abstractions.ApiReferenceNavigationState
files.Summary: Represents the navigation state for the API Reference component. This state is typically used to track the current location within the API documentation.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.AspireBinarySource
files.Summary: Defines where Aspire binaries are resolved from.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.AspireConfig
files.Summary: Configuration options for the Aspire module.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.AspireServiceStatus
files.Summary: Represents the current status of the Aspire service.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.CommandlineServiceOptions
files.Summary: Defines command-line service options for the Aspire extension.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.Event.AspireDashboardReadyEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when the Aspire dashboard is ready.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.Event.AspireServiceStartFaultedAndDisposeFinishedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when Aspire startup fails and disposal is complete.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.Event.AspireServiceStatusChangedEvent
files.Summary: Event raised when the Aspire service status changes.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.IAspireMainMenuItemsProvider
files.Summary: Provides main menu items for the Aspire module.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.IAspireServiceManager
files.Summary: Manages the Aspire service lifecycle and tool acquisition.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.ICommandlineResourcesProvider
files.Summary: Provides command-line based Aspire extension resources.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.IExtensionResourcesProvider
files.Summary: Defines a provider that configures resources for an Aspire extension.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.Aspire.Abstractions.ServiceStatus
files.Summary: Represents the lifecycle state of the service.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.CLI.Abstractions.CLIConfig
files.Summary: Configuration options for the CLI module.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.CLI.Abstractions.CLIUriOptions
files.Summary: Defines CLI behavior parsed from URI query parameters.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.ChromeExtensions.Abstractions.ChromeExtensionManagerConfig
files.Summary: Stores locally managed Chrome Web Store extension packages for the web browser module.

files.Title: ZYC.Framework.Modules.ChromeExtensions.Abstractions.ChromeExtensionPackageMetadata
files.Summary: Describes Chrome Web Store package metadata returned by the update service.
